basic_details.job_title: PSPCL JE Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 622 Junior Engineer Posts
basic_details.post_name: Junior Engineer (Electrical / Electrical and Electronics Engineering)
basic_details.selection_process_brief: Online Computer Based Test (CBT) - 100 MCQs, 2 Hours
basic_details.short_information: The Punjab State Power Corporation (PSPCL) has released the PSPCL Recruitment 2026 notification vide Advertisement No. CRA 316/26 for 622 posts of Junior Engineer on 13 April 2026. Candidates holding a full-time Diploma or B.E./B.Tech./B.Sc. Engineering in Electrical / Electrical and Electronics Engineering are eligible to apply. The online application process will be active from 20 April 2026 to 10 May 2026, and candidates can apply through the official PSPCL website pspcl.in. The notification PDF and apply link are available below.

application_fee.details: Candidates are required to pay the application fee through online mode only. The fee once paid is non-refundable under any circumstances. The last date for fee deposit is 15 May 2026. Bank charges, if any, will be additional. The fee structure is as follows:

qualification.education_qualification: Full Time Diploma / B.E. / B.Tech. / B.Sc. Engineering / AMIE in Electrical / Electrical and Electronics Engineering

vacancy_details.Category: PWD (PD) - Deaf and Hard of Hearing
PWD (PD) - Intellectual Disability and Mental Illness or Multiple Disabilities

salary_details.pay_scale: ₹35,400/- per month (as per 7th CPC Pay Matrix)

selection_process: The selection process for PSPCL Junior Engineer Recruitment 2026 will be conducted through an Online Computer Based Test (CBT). The examination will consist of 100 objective type multiple-choice questions to be completed in 2 hours (120 minutes). There will be negative marking of 0.25 marks (1/4th) for each wrong answer. In case of multiple shifts
normalization of marks will be applied and the final merit list will be prepared on the basis of normalized marks.
Minimum qualifying marks in the online test are as follows: General Category candidates must secure 45%
while Reserve Category candidates must secure 35%.
how_to_apply: Candidates are required to apply online only through the official PSPCL website pspcl.in. No other mode of application will be accepted. The online application window is open from 20 April 2026 to 10 May 2026, and the last date for fee deposit is 15 May 2026. No documents or certificates are required to be uploaded at the time of online application. Only one application per candidate will be accepted for the post.
Visit the official PSPCL website pspcl.in and read the full advertisement carefully before filling the application.
Register and fill the online application form with all required details accurately as per original documents.
Upload scanned Photograph and Signature in the prescribed format.
Pay the prescribed application fee through the online mode before the fee deposit deadline of 15 May 2026.
Submit the application and retain a copy for future reference.
After successful submission and fee payment, candidates will receive provisional admission to the examination.
Final selection is subject to document verification.
important_instructions: Candidates applying for PSPCL Junior Engineer Recruitment 2026 must carefully read all instructions mentioned in the official notification before submitting their application. Provisional admission to the examination does not guarantee eligibility; final selection is subject to verification of original documents. All updates regarding examination, result, and document checking will be sent via registered email ID, so candidates must keep their email ID and mobile number active throughout the recruitment process.

All information provided in the online application must match the original certificates; any mismatch will result in cancellation of candidature. Age, educational qualification, and other eligibility criteria will be considered as on 01-01-2026. Application fee is non-refundable under any circumstances. No request for change in category, sub-category, or any other details will be accepted after submission. Reservations and age relaxations will be given as per prevailing Government rules as detailed in the advertisement. PwD, Ex-Servicemen, Sports Person, Freedom Fighter, and other reserved category candidates must produce valid certificates at the time of document checking. Only one application per candidate is permitted; multiple applications will lead to disqualification. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. In case of any dispute, the decision of PSPCL shall be final and binding. Candidates are advised to visit the official PSPCL website pspcl.in regularly for all updates.

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies in PSPCL Junior Engineer Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 622 vacancies have been notified for the post of Junior Engineer (Electrical) under PSPCL Advertisement No. CRA 316/26.

faq.question: Q2. What are the online application dates for PSPCL JE Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online application window is open from 20 April 2026 to 10 May 2026, and the last date for fee deposit is 15 May 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for PSPCL Junior Engineer 2026?
faq.answer: For all candidates except SC and PwD, the fee is ₹1200 plus 18% GST (₹1416) plus bank charges; for SC and PwD candidates, the fee is ₹750 plus 18% GST (₹885) plus bank charges.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for PSPCL JE Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must be between 18 and 37 years of age as on 01 January 2026, with age relaxation applicable as per Punjab government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the educational qualification required for PSPCL Junior Engineer 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a full-time regular 3/4‑year Diploma in Electrical/Electrical & Electronics Engineering with at least 60% marks, or B.E/B.Tech/B.Sc Engineering in Electrical/Electrical & Electronics with at least 50% marks, or AMIE in Electrical/Electrical & Electronics with 50% marks, and must have passed Punjabi at least up to Matric or equivalent level.

faq.question: Q6. What is the pay scale for PSPCL Junior Engineer Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The minimum basic pay is ₹35,400 per month as per the 7th CPC pay matrix for the JE post.

faq.question: Q7. What is the exam pattern for PSPCL JE 2026 Computer Based Test?
faq.answer: The CBT will be of 2 hours with 100 MCQs: 50 questions from the concerned engineering discipline, 20 from Punjabi language, 10 from General Knowledge, 10 from Reasoning, and 10 from General English, with negative marking of 0.25 marks for each wrong answer.

faq.question: Q8. What are the minimum qualifying marks in the PSPCL JE online test?
faq.answer: General category candidates must score at least 45% marks, while reserved category candidates must score at least 35% marks in the online test to qualify.

faq.question: Q9. How is the category-wise distribution of PSPCL Junior Engineer 622 vacancies?
faq.answer: Out of 622 posts, major categories include 243 for General, 62 for EWS, 63 for SC (Mazhabi Balmiki), 61 for SC (Others), 62 for BC only, 44 for Ex‑Servicemen (Self/Dependent), several PwD subcategories (Deaf, Locomotor, Intellectual/Multiple), 12 for Sports Person (General), and 6 for Freedom Fighter, along with smaller XSM/SP sub-quota posts as per the notification.

faq.question: Q10. How can candidates apply online for PSPCL Junior Engineer Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Eligible candidates must apply online through the PSPCL website www.pspcl.in between 20 April and 10 May 2026, upload scanned photo and signature, pay the applicable fee by 15 May 2026, and later appear for the CBT; documents will be verified only at the final document‑checking stage.
